name: Missed a week of work after slipping on wet floor at job, what benefits?

mainEntity.name: Missed a week of work after slipping on wet floor at job, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66% wages after 3 days + full medical in UT comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah TTD pays 66 2/3% average weekly wage after 3-day wait, up to 52 weeks initially; medical 100% covered[10]. Key factors: Wage basis last 12 weeks. Doctor excuses needed. File promptly.

description: 66% wages after 3 days + full medical in UT comp.
